parametrics.parameterDescr: Engine type and configuration.
Overall height of the system.
Overall length of the system.
Company or companies that manufacture the system.
Transmission (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Width (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Assembly (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).

Cuba (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Internal (and optionally external) fuel capacity.
Period during which the system has been/was in active service.

Overall mass of the system.
Top speed, expressed as a Mach number where the source gives one.
Total number of units produced.

Production (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Maximum operational range.

System type/role classification.
USERS (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).

VARIANTS (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
